title: Show list of existing app plan discounts in dev center
excerpt:
Is there a way to view all the discounts that have been given to customers for our apps? Ideally, I would like to be able to see the account ID/slug, plan, and percentage discount. 
This is especially helpful to know for…

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to view all the discounts that have been given to customers for our apps? Ideally, I would like to be able to see the account ID/slug, plan, and percentage discount.

This is especially helpful to know for customer upgrades, in case we want to apply the same discount to the next tier. Currently, I’m just keeping track manually, but that’s far from ideal and error prone.

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: I think not. But double-checking here Slack

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @PluginGenie,

As of today, there is no way to do that.

I can convert this topic into a request, if that is OK with you

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for letting me know. Yes, converting it into a request would be great. Thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! This is a request!

Everyone: You can vote for it on the top left corner of the screen

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday I’m pretty sure this is released

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes indeed – this was released in July, thanks to the feedback of this group!

Apps Framework

Marketplace app discount improvements

We're excited to announce a handful of updates to marketplace app discounts, including expanded functionality, improvements to the UI, and new APIs! View existing discounts in the UI You can now view existing discounts in the UI itself! There, you...
